stitch.notes: Generated mockups for the heads-up display, planet info side panel, and bottom time-control cluster.

ui_ux_pro_max.notes: Orchestrated sibling skills. Selected dark observatory palette, editorial serif + mono pairing, motion curves.

firecrawl.notes: Firecrawl was unavailable during the build. Pipeline fell back to web_fetch on the same NASA science URLs to retrieve planetary data. No fabricated data — all values pulled from live NASA pages.

magic_21st.notes: Generated time-speed slider, sliding side panel, icon button cluster, and planet navigation list. Adapted to vanilla HTML/CSS/JS.

nano_banana_2.notes: Generated 10 sphere-mappable textures (sun + 8 planets), deep-space nebula backdrop for loading screen, favicon, and OG card.

brand_skill.notes: Established 'Quiet Observer' voice archetype, tagline, and planetarium-narrator microcopy throughout.

design_skill.notes: Produced minimalist concentric-orbit logo mark, favicon set, and 1200x630 OG card featuring Saturn.

design_system_skill.notes: Defined color, spacing, radii, motion, and typography tokens as CSS custom properties.

ui_styling_skill.notes: Slider, icon buttons, toggle, side panel with focus trap, hover labels.

fallbacks_triggered: Firecrawl unavailable -> switched to web_fetch for NASA planetary data scrape. All planet data still sourced live, not fabricated.
